description: Publish notes, search, send DMs, and interact with Nostr via relays. Supports kind 0 (profile), kind 1 (notes), kind 3 (contacts), kind 4 (DMs), kind 7 (reactions). Event signing via Schnorr/secp256k1, published to relays over WebSocket.

auth.instructions:
1. Generate or obtain your Nostr private key (nsec1... or hex)
2. Store it in the workspace at nostr/private_key using memory_write
   - hex format: 64 hex chars (e.g. 0123456789abcdef...)
   - nsec format: nsec1qrpvf... (bech32-encoded)
3. Use 'get_pubkey' to verify your setup
